productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Run Ride White Shoe
description: reebok Run Ride, as the name goes, is an excellent pair to run in. Extremely lightweight and with a smart exterior, it is the ideal pair of shoes for any kind of athletic activity. Wear it for your work-out sessions or for a day out with your friends.Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for maximum ventilation and durability Padded mesh tongue for better breathability and snug Fit Lace-ups for snug fit Synthetic laces for durability Outsole emddded on toe box Cushioned collar for a better fit Brand logo on the side and back panel of the shoe for style Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight durability Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Outsole TPR outsole with diamond shaped lugs for multi-directional traction Flex grooves for natural flexibility Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a dryerAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
